content.en:
After the departure of the Garanbao ship, the Supreme Forces began to prepare for the extradimensional storm.

At most, a hundred trillion solstice years will come, and an extradimensional storm will come.

At that time, ordinary beings could not survive at all.

In the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm, there is a high probability that more than ninety percent of living beings will fall, unless there is a supreme force to protect them.

But the supreme force is not a philanthropist, so it is naturally impossible to do such a thing.

Besides, for them, no matter how many ordinary creatures fall, they can reproduce a batch when the time comes.

Ye Tian will only shelter the Terran or a few races that have taken refuge in the Terran Race, allowing them to enter the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, but it does not necessarily guarantee that every living being will be able to survive.

After all, the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array can resist the penetration of the extradimensional storm, but it may not be completely able to resist it, and it may still lead to some escaping power within the "Nine Two-Zero" Formation, and some creatures may still be wiped out if they are unlucky.

......

"The Star Dimension Void Heaven Array has been arranged, and I have also arranged one at the Eternal Realm Boundary to send other Terran and Terran races into it, and then let the six Terran Peak Realm Gods maintain the formation. Now it's time to fuse the extra-dimensional!"

The extra-dimensional thing that Ye Tian wants to fuse, one is the Jialan stone plate, which is a super-dimensional thing that can be deduced, once the fusion is successful, he can use this extra-dimensional thing to deduce, and there is a chance to use it to deduce the perfect extra-dimensional Dao inheritance in the future.

The second fused extra-dimensional thing is the weird blood pupil, if he has a weird blood pupil, he may have a greater chance of finding the super-dimensional elf after the super-dimensional storm comes, and once he finds the super-dimensional elf, maybe he will have a deeper understanding of the super-dimensional power.

Moreover, he also has a superdimensional epiphany, which can be comprehended with the help of a strange blood pupil.

Ye Tianxian tried to fuse the Jialan Stone Disk, the Jialan Stone Disk is a medium-dimensional thing, and the difficulty of fusion should be lower.

After repeated attempts, Ye Tian failed again and again, changed his body again and again, and finally successfully fused this extradimensional thing in a fusion process.

Once the fusion is successful, even if the replica body falls, the other replica bodies can also perfectly fuse the extradimensional thing.

After all, each of his replica bodies is the same, and any extradimensional thing can be fused into other bodies.

After the fusion was successful, Ye Tian began to fuse the strange blood pupil, one of the fragments of the high-level extradimensional thing.

I have to say that the fusion of this high-level extra-dimensional thing is very difficult, and it is even more difficult than the fusion of other high-level extra-dimensional things, because this thing is too weird, and when it is fused, it constantly penetrates the will and all parts of the body, and if it is slightly wrong, it will fall instantly.

Ye Tian spent a trillion years in the Dao Era before he successfully fused the strange blood pupil.

After fusing the strange blood pupils, Ye Tian was ready to try to comprehend the power of the extradimensionality.

So, he took out the extradimensional epiphany.

"The extra-dimensional epiphany, which contains the true extra-dimensional power, can finally be seen now. "

Ye Tian took out a Transcendental Epiphany and poured into it with the power of the Eternal Dao Seed, prompting it to bloom.

Rumble!!!!

The extradimensional epiphany gradually bloomed, and the surrounding void began to distort, gradually turning into an extradimensional world.

Here, the power of the extradimensional power bursts out, which is the extra-dimensional power of extra-dimensional things, but the real extra-dimensional power, the extra-dimensional power that comes from the extra-dimensional origin.

"Weird blood pupils!"

"Strange bloody eyes!"

The Strange Blood Eye is a super-dimensional technique, and this extra-dimensional technique can only exert the ability of the Strange Blood Pupil when combined with the Strange Blood Pupil.

And this extradimensional technique was given by the Jialanbao ship, and its value is not high.

After all, there are no weird blood pupils, and you can't practice weird blood eyes.

And without weird blood eyes, weird blood pupils are worthless.

Therefore, if he didn't give away the weird blood eyes, Ye Tian wouldn't buy the weird blood eyes.

Airplanes!

Little by little, time passed.

The extradimensional epiphany gradually withered, and the extradimensional power dissipated.

"It's a pity, time is too short!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, if the extradimensional epiphany lasts for a long time, it won't be so cheap. []

Subsequently, he continued to use the second extradimensional epiphany, and continued to use the strange blood pupil to comprehend the essence of the superdimensional power0 .....

In this way, the super-dimensional epiphany in Ye Tian's hand was used up one by one.

Soon after, the extradimensional epiphany was exhausted.

And.

Ye Tian also had serious problems in his body because of his continued use of the strange blood pupil.

The most important thing is the will, there is a big problem with his will to copy the body, even when he is not cultivating, he can hear some strange sounds and some strange illusions.

It is the will that has been eroded and has an inexplicable effect.

Fortunately, this condition does not affect other replicated bodies.

Subsequently, Ye Tian let the replica body annihilate on its own, completely solving the trouble.

In fact, even if this replica body is not annihilated, it will not last long.

After the extra-dimensional epiphany was exhausted, Ye Tian had comprehended it on his own for a period of time, and only then did he get out of the customs.

"This practice has gained a lot, although I have not comprehended the real superdimensional power, but I have enough understanding of the superdimensional power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If he finds the extradimensional elf again, then he has even more hope of comprehending the power of the extradimensional.

"Although the weird blood eyes are very good, they don't perfectly exert the effect of the weird blood eyes, at most one-tenth of the effect is exerted. This should have been created by a half-step extradimensional realm powerhouse who fused with a strange blood pupil, and the other party's fusion time was not very long, so he couldn't create a too powerful extradimensional technique. And I'm different, I can always fuse the weird blood pupil, 0.5 and also have a Ga Lan Stone Disk, if you use the Ga Lan Stone Disk to create, maybe you can create a better extradimensional technique. "

Of course.

This was discovered by Ye Tian constantly using the weird blood pupil, otherwise, he would have kept those extradimensional epiphany.

In the following days, Ye Tian used the Jialan stone plate to continue to deduce, and once his body could not bear it, he would change his body and continue to deduce.

In this way, as a long time passed, Ye Tian finally deduced a super-dimensional technique that could almost bring out all the effects of the strange blood pupil.

【Strange Blood Pupil Technique】

Ye Tian directly named it after this extradimensional thing.

With the Strange Blood Pupil Technique, his hope of comprehending the power of the extradimensional dimension was even greater.

However, the cost of the Strange Blood Pupil Technique is greater, but he doesn't care about the price.
